title: triteleia lemmoniae
intro: Triteleia lemmoniae, also known as Lemmon's triteleia, is a perennial wildflower native to the mountainous regions of California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triteleia lemmoniae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for various health benefits, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
